title: Fix the syntax highlighting in the example
body:
Previously, dots were not included, which was breaking multiline syntax highlighting in for example in interactive mode. Example:
![Screenshot from 2019-11-27 16-06-00](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/2760196/69730070-17958a00-1130-11ea-8be2-86728d993478.png)

Here is how it looks after the fix:
![Screenshot from 2019-11-27 16-02-36](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/2760196/69730115-2aa85a00-1130-11ea-959d-5b54896bcb92.png)
commits: Fix the syntax highlighting in the example
